steps.title: Find the function of the underlined sentence
steps.content: The underlined sentence reports that dream eye movements closely matched awake eye movements. This is a comparison — and the text says it led the team to their conclusion. A sentence that establishes a parallel circumstance supporting a conclusion is functioning as comparative justification.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'To offer key evidence that undermines LaBerge and team's initial hypothesis': The text never mentions an initial hypothesis, so nothing is undermined. ✗
  • Choice B — 'To show the unexpected result that led LaBerge and team to change the focus of their study': No change of focus is described, and the result is not framed as unexpected. ✗
  • Choice C — 'To illustrate an important real-world implication of LaBerge and team's main finding': The underlined portion is the finding, not an implication of it. ✗
  • Choice D — 'To identify a comparable circumstance that helps justify LaBerge and team's conclusion': The matching eye-movement pattern is the comparable circumstance that supports the team's conclusion. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
